allow: PowerShell(gh pr list --head claude/amazing-kilby-20d089 --state all --json url,state,number)

PowerShell($gh = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($gh\) { $gh.Source } else { "not found in PATH" }; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\GitHubCLI\\gh.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "---"; where.exe gh 2>&1)
